summary: Tested A1A1 (AQAS) backend (10 pytest tests, 8 pass, 2 fail) and frontend (Playwright e2e). Frontend fully functional: hero copy, brand, CTA, KPIs (live from /api/waitlist/stats), all 5 nav links scroll to sections, waitlist submission shows success panel + 'Signal locked' toast, duplicate email shows 'already registered' error toast and keeps form. Backend has one minor bug: POST /api/waitlist returns the email in original case in the response body (DB stores it lowercased, so duplicate-detection and persistence work correctly).

minor.issue: Response body returns the email with original case (e.g. 'TEST_x@Example.COM'), while the document persisted in MongoDB is lowercased. Spec/PRD says 'returns 201 with id/email lowercased'. Fix: in join_waitlist, set entry.email = payload.email.lower() before model_dump, or build the response from the lowercased doc. (server.py lines 88-99)

action_items: Lowercase the response email on POST /api/waitlist (server.py join_waitlist) so the API response matches the persisted record. Currently DB is correct (lowercased + dedup works case-insensitive), but the returned WaitlistEntry still has the original-case email.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: WaitlistEntry response uses raw payload.email; lowercasing is applied only on the DB doc, not the returned model. Suggest constructing the entry with the lowercased email.
server.py: Pydantic v2 deprecation - @app.on_event('shutdown') should migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers (minor).
Landing.jsx: API call has no error UI state — silent .catch(() => {}) on stats fetch. Acceptable since defaults are seeded, but ideally surface failure state.

Hero.jsx: HERO_IMG and HERO_IMG_FALLBACK URLs look swapped/typo-like (one is missing a digit). Currently fallback is tried first; if it 404s onError swaps to the longer URL — works, but worth cleaning up.
test_credentials: N/A — public landing page, no auth.
seed_data_creation: Inserted ~6 TEST_-prefixed waitlist entries during testing (visible as stats incremented from 10,000 agents/1,284 fields baseline to 10,018/1,290). Cleanup not performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints: GET /api/, POST /api/waitlist, GET /api/waitlist/stats. Duplicate detection is case-insensitive (DB stores lowercased). The only outstanding backend gap is that POST response.email is not lowercased even though DB is. After main agent fixes, re-run /app/backend/tests/test_waitlist_api.py — TestWaitlistPost::test_create_valid and test_email_lowercased_on_create should pass. Frontend has zero issues. All requested data-testids are present and working.
rca of the issue: POST /api/waitlist: `entry = WaitlistEntry(**payload.model_dump())` builds the response model from the raw payload, then only the dict copy (`doc`) is lowercased before insert. The returned `entry` therefore retains the original-case email. Mitigation: either `entry = WaitlistEntry(**{**payload.model_dump(), 'email': payload.email.lower()})` or rebuild the response from `doc` after lowercasing.
